description: HWPX compatibility corpus entries. Paths may point at existing shared fixtures.

blockedOperations.notes: Generated HWPX table-cell mutation has not passed Hancom compatibility gates.

fixtures.notes: HWPX smoke fixture for rhwp opt-in read/render and text replacement; custom handler remains default.

fixtureClassCoverage.notes: HWPX smoke fixture covers Korean text rendering with mixed scripts.
Synthetic non-zip bytes saved with .hwpx extension must be rejected by package integrity check before any operation runs.
